title: Contract Integrity Review
goal: Check whether the repo's most central claims still resolve to real canonical surfaces, runnable commands, and enforced checks.
scope: current planning and maintainer check outputs
non_goals: Do not re-review package-internal implementation details.
Do not duplicate the maintainer-workflow or source-payload-install reviews.

review_mode.review question: Do the repo's core claimed paths and commands still resolve cleanly?

recommendation.dismiss: all checked claims in scope currently resolve cleanly

drift_log: 2026-04-09: Review created as part of the full review-matrix pass.
